ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard for the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Name of the size type (e.g., Alpha, Numeric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reference" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size reference */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region ID */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size type ID */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reference_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size reference ID */,
  "part" TEXT /* Part of the clothing being measured (e.g., Shoulder, Bust, Waist, Hip) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Measurement value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_reference ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size reference ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_reference ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
